subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto those who have believed in God, the Sovereign, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذینهم آمنوا بالله الملک المقتدر العزیز القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
